message:
feat(engine): add parser gap inventory module and CLI tool

New parser gap inventory system for tracking and reporting gaps in
parser coverage:
- parser_gap_inventory.rs: core inventory logic
- franken_parser_gap_inventory.rs: CLI binary for gap analysis
- parser_gap_inventory_cli.rs: CLI integration tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
